name: Dashboard Search — search bar filters notification entries correctly

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://onenotify-7593c.web.app after setting window.localStorage.setItem('paired_mobile_uid', 'test_mobile_uid_device_101') so that the Timeline Dashboard is active.
Locate the search input field with hint text 'Search notifications by app, title, or content...' and type the query 'WhatsApp'.
The search input field accurately displays the entered text 'WhatsApp' and the dashboard updates its filtered view without any UI error crashes.
